ddls:
CREATE TABLE "debates" (
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debate session */,
  "debate_date" TEXT /* Date of the debate in DD-MM-YYYY format */,
  "debate_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the debate_types table */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the subjects table */,
  "titles" TEXT /* Full titles of the debates discussed */,
  "debate_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the debate */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the debate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_number", "debate_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Identifier for the session of the debate */,
  "debate_date" TEXT /* Date of the debate */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "participant_role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the participant_roles table */,
  "speech_time" TEXT /* Time allocated for the participant's speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_number", "debate_date", "participant_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_participant_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_role_id") REFERENCES participant_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debate_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debate type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the debate type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the debate type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject matter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "view_logs" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number of the debate viewed */,
  "debate_date" TEXT /* Date of the debate viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the debate was viewed */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the viewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_view_logs_debate_date FOREIGN KEY ("debate_date") REFERENCES debates ("debate_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_view_logs_session_number FOREIGN KEY ("session_number") REFERENCES debates ("session_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., researcher, official, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debate_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number of the associated debate */,
  "debate_date" TEXT /* Date of the associated debate */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., transcript, minutes, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_documents_session_number FOREIGN KEY ("session_number") REFERENCES debates ("session_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_documents_debate_date FOREIGN KEY ("debate_date") REFERENCES debates ("debate_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "debate_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debate title */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number of the associated debate */,
  "debate_date" TEXT /* Date of the associated debate */,
  "title_text" TEXT /* Full title of the debate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_titles_debate_date FOREIGN KEY ("debate_date") REFERENCES debates ("debate_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_titles_session_number FOREIGN KEY ("session_number") REFERENCES debates ("session_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant's role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the participant's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speeches" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number of the debate */,
  "debate_date" TEXT /* Date of the debate */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant who delivered the speech */,
  "speech_text" TEXT /* Text of the speech */,
  "speech_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the speech */,
  "speech_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the speech */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_session_number FOREIGN KEY ("session_number") REFERENCES debates ("session_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_debate_date FOREIGN KEY ("debate_date") REFERENCES debates ("debate_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "debate_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number of the debate */,
  "debate_date" TEXT /* Date of the debate */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic discussed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_topics_session_number FOREIGN KEY ("session_number") REFERENCES debates ("session_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_topics_debate_date FOREIGN KEY ("debate_date") REFERENCES debates ("debate_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the debate_topics table */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag assigned to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tags_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES debate_topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debate_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number of the rated debate */,
  "debate_date" TEXT /* Date of the rated debate */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who rated the debate */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the debate (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review or comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_ratings_session_number FOREIGN KEY ("session_number") REFERENCES debates ("session_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_ratings_debate_date FOREIGN KEY ("debate_date") REFERENCES debates ("debate_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debate_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
